sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ سُهَيْلَةُ صَوْتَ مَطَرٍ خَفِيفٍ عَلَى النَّافِذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Suhejla je čula zvuk lagane kiše na prozoru.
sentences.translationEn: Suhayla heard the sound of light rain on the window.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتِ النَّافِذَةَ وَشَمَّتْ رَائِحَةَ الأَرْضِ الْمَبْلُولَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorila je prozor i namirisala miris mokre zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: She opened the window and smelled the scent of wet earth.

sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّتْ هَذِهِ الرَّائِحَةَ كَثِيرًا وَجَلَسَتْ تَسْتَمِعُ.
sentences.translation: Jako je voljela taj miris i sjela je da sluša.
sentences.translationEn: She loved that smell very much and sat down to listen.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَتْ يَوْمَ الْمَطَرِ وَهِيَ طِفْلَةٌ تَلْعَبُ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Sjetila se kišnog dana kada je kao dijete igrala na ulici.
sentences.translationEn: She remembered the rainy day when as a child she played in the street.
